title: Game Quest specification document
description: Schema validating the Game Quest specification.

id.title: Quest ID
id.description: The unique ID that is used by the program to identify the game quest.

title.title: Quest title
title.description: The Quest title to be shown on different game screens.

description.title: Quest description
description.description: The Quest description to be shown on different game screens.

objective.title: Quest objective
objective.description: The Quest objective to be shown on different game screens.

prereqs.title: Prerequisities
prereqs.description: List of quests that will be uploaded prior to quest load.

cleanup.title: Cleanups
cleanup.description: Cleanups to be done before quest upload

processors.title: Quest Processors
processors.description: List of processors used for processing the game logic.

maps.title: Quest Maps
maps.description: List of maps used for quest.

dialogs.title: Quest Dialogs
dialogs.description: List of dialogs used for quest.

templates.title: Quest Templates
templates.description: List of templates used in the quest.

entities.title: Quest Entities
entities.description: List of entities used in the quest.

handlers.title: Quest Event Handlers
handlers.description: List of entities used in the quest.
